{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Forger symbol
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Forger symbol]] is from the [[Sacred Valley]] badges.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
